audit.move-faster: Teams spend days reading client evidence that could be screened in hours
audit.raise-accuracy: Manual sampling misses anomalies that systematic AI review surfaces consistently
audit.scale-capacity: Senior auditors spend time on document reading that AI-assisted juniors could handle
audit.elevate-experience: Clients wait longer than expected due to manual processing bottlenecks

kpmg-law.move-faster: Contract review cycles take 2–3× longer than needed due to manual clause reading
kpmg-law.raise-accuracy: Risk clauses are occasionally overlooked in high-volume reviews under time pressure
kpmg-law.scale-capacity: Legal research occupies qualified lawyers who should be advising, not searching
kpmg-law.elevate-experience: Response time to standard legal queries is longer than clients now expect

tax.move-faster: Tax research queries take 30+ min when the answer exists in known circulars
tax.raise-accuracy: HS code misclassification leads to penalties that better lookup tools would prevent
tax.scale-capacity: Compliance formatting consumes hours advisors could spend on strategy
tax.elevate-experience: Advisory turnaround could be significantly faster with AI-assisted drafting

deal-advisory.move-faster: DD document review ties up analyst teams for days before any insight emerges
deal-advisory.raise-accuracy: Red flags in large data rooms are sometimes missed when teams are fatigued
deal-advisory.scale-capacity: Junior analysts spend most of engagements on document intake rather than analysis
deal-advisory.elevate-experience: Deal teams struggle to maintain consistent quality across large engagements

consulting.move-faster: Post-meeting write-ups consume hours that could go to client value
consulting.raise-accuracy: Inconsistencies across large deliverables are hard to catch manually
consulting.scale-capacity: Consultants draft deliverables from scratch when AI could accelerate the baseline
consulting.elevate-experience: Deliverable quality varies across team members — AI can standardise the baseline

shared-services.move-faster: Admin tasks like formatting and filing repeat daily across the team
shared-services.raise-accuracy: Errors in data entry and formatting create downstream rework
shared-services.scale-capacity: High-volume repetitive tasks limit capacity for strategic support
shared-services.elevate-experience: Internal stakeholders wait too long for standard requests and reports
